# Automatic Stay in Bankruptcy - Section 362 Guide [2026] - 362 Stay
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> The automatic stay stops creditor actions the moment you file bankruptcy. Learn what it covers, exceptions, and violations. Free 2026 Section 3...

## About
automaticstay.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Automatic Stay: Business vs Personal Bankruptcy - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/business-vs-personal.html
- How Long Does the Automatic Stay Last? - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/duration.html
- Exceptions to the Automatic Stay: Section 362(b) - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/exceptions.html
- Automatic Stay in Bankruptcy - Section 362 Guide [2026] - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/
- Motions for Relief from Stay: When Creditors Ask to Proceed - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/relief-from-stay.html
- Automatic Stay Limits for Repeat Filers: 362(c)(3) and 362(c)(4) - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/serial-filer-limits.html
- Automatic Stay Exceptions - What Is Not Covered - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/stay-exceptions.html
- Creditor Violated the Automatic Stay? What to Do - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/violations.html
- What the Automatic Stay Stops: Complete List - 362 Stay: https://automaticstay.org/what-it-stops.html
- Privacy Policy - 362stay: https://362stay/privacy.html
